mapper.select: SELECT * FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address (user_id, name, phone, province, city, district, detail, is_default, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detail}, #{isDefault}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE address SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail = #{detail}, is_default = #{isDefault}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE address SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM address WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1
